Hi, I'm Vani.

Artist, creator, and storyteller based in Delhi.

Paintings, textured art, 3D canvas paintings, creative experiments — and occasionally ideas that should have stayed in my sketchbook.

Everything here starts with curiosity and a desire to make people feel something.
